result: Closed-form no-autograd Neocognitron built and characterized: conv2d S-cell, group_pool C-cell, ScBlock deep stack, global_entropy_pool invariant top (hypothesis confirmed), spatial-backbone pose net, skeleton hg_conv (P3 win / P4 limit).
source_changes: examples/neocognitron_entropy.rs, pose_backbone.rs, pose_symmetry.rs, pose_loop.rs (import oriented_sobel_bank, drop PI)
open_questions: per-edge transform op -> re-run P4 (hurts->wins) + reflection symmetry
consolidate remaining auroc copies; extract keypoint-backbone on a 2nd consumer

next_experiment_proposal.name: per-edge transform op for signed hg_conv
next_experiment_proposal.new_capability: each hyperedge owns its learned map -> asymmetric loop closure + reflection symmetry expressible
next_experiment_proposal.negative_outcome_assimilation: if the loop still hurts, assimilate as a stronger closure on signed-hg_conv expressivity
